title: Treatment of E. coli (Escherichia coli) infection - Canada.ca
content:
## Treatment of E. coli (Escherichia coli) infection
Learn how an E. coli infection is diagnosed and treated.
- How is an E. coli infection diagnosed?
- How is an E. coli infection treated?

## How is  an E. coli infection diagnosed?
E. coli infection is diagnosed through laboratory testing, usually of a  stool sample.

## How is  an E. coli infection treated?
There is no medical treatment  for E. coli infections.
If you think you  have illness due to E. coli, see your health care provider. They can:
- monitor  your illness
- provide  advice and guidance on how to avoid dehydration (loss of fluids)
If you develop complications , you may need other treatment.
